sevenDayForecast.headline: A tropical low (15U) has a Low risk of development in the Indian Ocean as it remains well off the WA coast.
points: A tropical low (15U) lies over open waters in the Indian Ocean, well to the north of the Pilbara coast.
It is expected to move west southwest, and may gradually develop. It has a Low risk of developing into a tropical cyclone from later Thursday.
From late Sunday, Tropical Low 15U may move into a less favourable environment and begin to weaken.
15U is forecast to stay over open waters, with no direct impacts expected to WA mainland or island communities.
